Get the MyChart App!
Log in to MyChart
MyChart is an online portal for Contra Costa Regional Medical Center & Health Centers patients. With MyChart, people can get many of their healthcare needs met from home or on the go with the mobile app.
Schedule Appointments
Primary care visits
Mammograms
Labs & tests (NEW!)
Email Your Doctors
You can now send messages to specialists — not just your primary care doctor.
Get Test Results Online
No need to wait for a phone call.
Request Prescription Refills
Ask your doctor or psychiatrist to renew a prescription when you're out of medication.
And that's not all. With MyChart, you can also review your immunizations, medications, allergies, discharge summaries, access your
Contra Costa Health Plan ID card
and more. MyChart is secure — we take great care to ensure your information is kept protected and private.
For more information about MyChart and how to sign up, talk to provider's office. You can also call our toll-free support number at 1-844-622-5465 or email
mychart.support@cchealth.org
.
